basics.name: Kshitij Arora
basics.title: Associate System Engineer at IBM India | Aspiring SDE
basics.summary: Aspiring Software Development Engineer (SDE) with 1.5 years of full-time experience at IBM as an Associate System Engineer (ASE). Strong foundation in data structures and algorithms, full-stack web development, and problem-solving, with hands-on experience building React.js and Node.js applications, developing REST APIs, and maintaining enterprise systems. Actively seeking an SDE role to design and develop scalable, high-performance software solutions. A computer science undergraduate with a passion for continuous learning and problem-solving. Currently open to new opportunities where I can apply my expertise to drive innovation and make a positive impact.

bullets: Developed and enhanced responsive frontend components using React.js for an internal enterprise application, improving usability and performance.
Worked across Cloud, On-Premises, and RISE SAP environments, gaining exposure to large-scale enterprise infrastructure.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in the SAP Basis domain to resolve technical incidents, ensuring reliable system integration, high availability, and improved user satisfaction.
Performed monthly AWS maintenance tag changes via Terraform for planned downtime and patching.
Executed SAP Basis administrative tasks, including system monitoring, user management, and transport support.
Gained hands-on experience in production and non-production SAP system support.
Managed relational databases using MySQL and SQL Server (SSMS), developing optimized SQL queries for data analysis, manipulation, and efficient database design.

achievements.title: 150+ Questions Solved
achievements.context: Solved 150+ Questions on Online Platforms like Leetcode, GeeksforGeeks etc.

projects.title: Leetlab
bullets: Built a LeetCode-like coding platform using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL.
Implemented secure user authentication and authorization using JWT and cookies, and designed RESTful APIs to integrate frontend and backend services.
Developed an in-browser code editor using Monaco Editor with syntax highlighting and real-time code execution for an enhanced user experience.

projects.title: Quick Sign
bullets: Developed a web application for creating and saving digital signatures using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with export support as .jpg images.
Implemented client-side data persistence using browser localStorage, enabling secure reuse without backend dependency.

education.institution: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology (KiiT University)
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

certifications: Aws Academy Graduate-Aws Academy Introduction To Cloud Semester 1
